disputed_language: An organization trail records configured CloudTrail events for the management account and the member accounts in its AWS Organizations organization.
explanation: The account-coverage statement omits the documented exception that a member account sends no activity to a multi-Region organization trail whose home Region is opt-in until that account enables the home Region. Valid destination policies do not satisfy this separate Region prerequisite.
required_action: Carry the opt-in-home-Region qualification in this exact claim?s statement or applicability metadata.
suggested_revision: An organization trail records configured events for the management and member accounts subject to its single-/multi-Region design and each account?s opt-in Region enablement.

supporting_source.locator: Organization account coverage and opt-in Region behavior
supporting_source.title: Creating a trail for an organization
